_meta.description: Per-terrain-type properties. Dig time is modified by drill class effectiveness and tier. Terrain affects movement speed. Terrain does NOT affect chest spawns and has no terrain-specific loot. Bedrock is hardest and bounds the playfield.
_meta.status: PLACEHOLDER — all numbers TBD pending balance pass

fields.base_dig_time: seconds for a Common drill of a neutral class to break one tile
fields.class_effectiveness: per drill-class multiplier on dig time (lower = the class is strong vs this terrain)
